name: STT Benchmark Gold-92
description: Gold held-out benchmark for STT evaluation in the Rezolve voice commerce assistant. 93 WAV clips from real production sessions (investor-relations domain). Each clip is annotated with: ground-truth transcript, current production Deepgram transcription, and Whisper Large v2 transcription. Speakers include accented English (French accent prominent). Used as the primary regression test for all STT experiments — NEVER use for training or fine-tuning.
source: Rezolve production voice sessions (brainpowa-realtime-api), curated from 92-session batch
license: internal — Rezolve proprietary, not for public release
